v2.intro1: We're looking for early contributors to help build Nasun from the ground up.
v2.intro2: If you're a creator, developer, artist, or community leader who wants to help shape Nasun from Day 1, we'd love to hear from you.
v2.closing1: Nasun is community-funded, not VC-backed. We're building this with our people, not with a fund.
v2.closing2: Spots are limited. If you're interested, email us or DM @Nasun_io.

intro.rest: help us grow the Nasun community through their platforms and audiences. We support those who help more people discover Nasun—and they earn rewards for doing it.

contentCreators.title: Content Creators and KOLs
items: X (Twitter) creators or influencers with established audiences
Engagement-focused accounts that drive meaningful discussions
Those who consistently share insights in gaming, tech, or Web3 space

youtubeCreators.title: YouTube Creators
items: YouTube video makers who document, explain, or entertain
Channels with an existing subscriber base (any size)
Creators who cover gaming, tech, crypto, or culture

rewards.title: Rewards
items: A share of the Early Contributors budget (allocated per contribution)
A Legion NFT (free for qualified contributors)
Allowlist access for the Founders Battalion NFT

paragraphs: Nasun is a community-driven project — funded by the community, not VCs — during this early phase. This approach keeps us true to our core ethos of putting the community first.
We believe in fairness, transparency, and in recognizing the crucial role early adopters and contributors play in the genesis of a project like Nasun.
Wave 1 contributors will collaborate directly with the Nasun core team across creative, technical, and community initiatives.
Before engaging, we encourage you to explore our vision for the future of entertainment, technology, and finance here on our website — and see if our values align.

closing.before: If you're interested in joining as an
closing.after: , reach out to us via our social channels or email us at admin@nasun.io. We look forward to building with you!
